4012    /* a depth greater than zero is only allowed for a label */ view japanese
4013    if (!is_label && depth != 0) {
4014        ap_log_rerror(APLOG_MARK, APLOG_ERR, 0, r, APLOGNO(00607)
4015                      "Depth must be zero for UPDATE with a version");
4016        return HTTP_BAD_REQUEST;
4017    }
4018
4019    /* get the target value (a label or a version URI) */ view japanese
4020    apr_xml_to_text(r->pool, child, APR_XML_X2T_INNER, NULL, NULL,
4021                    &target, &tsize);
4022    if (tsize == 0) {
4023        ap_log_rerror(APLOG_MARK, APLOG_ERR, 0, r, APLOGNO(00608)
4024                      "A \"label-name\" or \"href\" element does not contain "
4025                      "any content.");
4026        return HTTP_BAD_REQUEST;
4027    }
4028
4029    /* Ask repository module to resolve the resource */
4030    err = dav_get_resource(r, 0 /* label_allowed */, 0 /* use_checked_in */,
4031                           &resource);
4032    if (err != NULL)
4033        return dav_handle_err(r, err, NULL);
4034
4035    /* check for any method preconditions */
4036    if (dav_run_method_precondition(r, resource, NULL, doc, &err) != DECLINED
4037            && err) {
4038        return dav_handle_err(r, err, NULL);
4039    }
4040
4041    if (!resource->exists) {
4042        /* Apache will supply a default error for this. */
4043        return HTTP_NOT_FOUND;
4044    }
4045
4046    /* ### need a general mechanism for reporting precondition violations
4047     * ### (should be returning XML document for 403/409 responses)
4048     */
4049    if (resource->type != DAV_RESOURCE_TYPE_REGULAR
4050        || !resource->versioned || resource->working) {
4051        return dav_error_response(r, HTTP_CONFLICT,
4052                                  "<DAV:must-be-checked-in-version-controlled-resource>");
4053    }
4054
4055    /* if target is a version, resolve the version resource */ view japanese
4056    /* ### dav_lookup_uri only allows absolute URIs; is that OK? */ view japanese
4057    if (!is_label) {
4058        lookup = dav_lookup_uri(target, r, 0 /* must_be_absolute */);
4059        if (lookup.rnew == NULL) {
4060            if (lookup.err.status == HTTP_BAD_REQUEST) {
4061                /* This supplies additional information for the default message. */
4062                ap_log_rerror(APLOG_MARK, APLOG_ERR, 0, r, APLOGNO(00609)
4063                              "%s", lookup.err.desc);
4064                return HTTP_BAD_REQUEST;
4065            }
4066
4067            /* ### this assumes that dav_lookup_uri() only generates a status
4068             * ### that Apache can provide a status line for!! */ view japanese
4069
4070            return dav_error_response(r, lookup.err.status, lookup.err.desc);
4071        }
4072        if (lookup.rnew->status != HTTP_OK) {
4073            /* ### how best to report this... */
4074            return dav_error_response(r, lookup.rnew->status,
4075                                      "Version URI had an error.");
4076        }
4077
4078        /* resolve version resource */ view japanese
4079        err = dav_get_resource(lookup.rnew, 0 /* label_allowed */,
4080                               0 /* use_checked_in */, &version);
4081        if (err != NULL)
4082            return dav_handle_err(r, err, NULL);
4083
4084        /* NULL out target, since we're using a version resource */ view japanese
4085        target = NULL;
4086    }
4087
4088    /* do the UPDATE operation */ view japanese
4089    err = (*vsn_hooks->update)(resource, version, target, depth, &multi_response);
4090
4091    if (err != NULL) {
4092        err = dav_push_error(r->pool, err->status, 0,
4093                             apr_psprintf(r->pool,
4094                                          "Could not UPDATE %s.",
4095                                          ap_escape_html(r->pool, r->uri)),
4096                             err);
4097        return dav_handle_err(r, err, multi_response);
4098    }
4099
4100    /* set the Cache-Control header, per the spec */
4101    apr_table_setn(r->headers_out, "Cache-Control", "no-cache");
4102
4103    /* no body */
4104    ap_set_content_length(r, 0);
4105
4106    return DONE;
4107}
4108
4109/* context maintained during LABEL treewalk */ view japanese
4110typedef struct dav_label_walker_ctx
4111{
4112    /* input: */ view japanese
4113    dav_walk_params w;
4114
4115    /* original request */ view japanese
4116    request_rec *r;
4117
4118    /* label being manipulated */ view japanese
4119    const char *label;
4120
4121    /* label operation */ view japanese
4122    int label_op;
4123#define DAV_LABEL_ADD           1
4124#define DAV_LABEL_SET           2
4125#define DAV_LABEL_REMOVE        3
4126
4127    /* version provider hooks */ view japanese
4128    const dav_hooks_vsn *vsn_hooks;
4129
4130} dav_label_walker_ctx;
4131
4132static dav_error * dav_label_walker(dav_walk_resource *wres, int calltype)
4133{
4134    dav_label_walker_ctx *ctx = wres->walk_ctx;
4135    dav_error *err = NULL;
4136
4137    /* check for any method preconditions */
4138    if (dav_run_method_precondition(ctx->r, NULL, wres->resource, NULL, &err) != DECLINED
4139            && err) {
4140    	/* precondition failed, dropping through */ view japanese
4141    }
4142
4143    /* Check the state of the resource: must be a version or
4144     * non-checkedout version selector
4145     */ view japanese
4146    /* ### need a general mechanism for reporting precondition violations
4147     * ### (should be returning XML document for 403/409 responses)
4148     */
4149    else if (wres->resource->type != DAV_RESOURCE_TYPE_VERSION &&
4150        (wres->resource->type != DAV_RESOURCE_TYPE_REGULAR
4151         || !wres->resource->versioned)) {
4152        err = dav_new_error(ctx->w.pool, HTTP_CONFLICT, 0, 0,
4153                            "<DAV:must-be-version-or-version-selector/>");
4154    }
4155    else if (wres->resource->working) {
4156        err = dav_new_error(ctx->w.pool, HTTP_CONFLICT, 0, 0,
4157                            "<DAV:must-not-be-checked-out/>");
4158    }
4159    else {
4160        /* do the label operation */ view japanese
4161        if (ctx->label_op == DAV_LABEL_REMOVE)
4162            err = (*ctx->vsn_hooks->remove_label)(wres->resource, ctx->label);
4163        else
4164            err = (*ctx->vsn_hooks->add_label)(wres->resource, ctx->label,
4165                                               ctx->label_op == DAV_LABEL_SET);
4166    }
4167
4168    if (err != NULL) {
4169        /* ### need utility routine to add response with description? */ view japanese
4170        dav_add_response(wres, err->status, NULL);
4171        wres->response->desc = err->desc;
4172    }
4173
4174    return NULL;
4175}
4176
4177static int dav_method_label(request_rec *r)
4178{
4179    dav_resource *resource;
4180    const dav_hooks_vsn *vsn_hooks = DAV_GET_HOOKS_VSN(r);
4181    apr_xml_doc *doc;
4182    apr_xml_elem *child;
4183    int depth;
4184    int result;
4185    apr_size_t tsize;
4186    dav_error *err;
4187    dav_label_walker_ctx ctx = { { 0 } };
4188    dav_response *multi_status;
4189
4190    /* If no versioning provider, or the provider doesn't support
4191     * labels, decline the request */ view japanese
4192    if (vsn_hooks == NULL || vsn_hooks->add_label == NULL)
4193        return DECLINED;
4194
4195    /* parse the request body */ view japanese
4196    if ((result = ap_xml_parse_input(r, &doc)) != OK) {
4197        return result;
4198    }
4199
4200    /* Ask repository module to resolve the resource */
4201    err = dav_get_resource(r, 1 /* label_allowed */, 0 /* use_checked_in */,
4202                           &resource);
4203    if (err != NULL)
4204        return dav_handle_err(r, err, NULL);
4205
4206    /* check for any method preconditions */
4207    if (dav_run_method_precondition(r, resource, NULL, doc, &err) != DECLINED
4208            && err) {
4209        return dav_handle_err(r, err, NULL);
4210    }
4211
4212    if (!resource->exists) {
4213        /* Apache will supply a default error for this. */
4214        return HTTP_NOT_FOUND;
4215    }
4216
4217    if ((depth = dav_get_depth(r, 0)) < 0) {
4218        /* dav_get_depth() supplies additional information for the
4219         * default message. */ view japanese
4220        return HTTP_BAD_REQUEST;
4221    }
4222
4223    if (doc == NULL || !dav_validate_root(doc, "label")) {
4224        /* This supplies additional information for the default message. */
4225        ap_log_rerror(APLOG_MARK, APLOG_ERR, 0, r, APLOGNO(00610)
4226                      "The request body does not contain "
4227                      "a \"label\" element.");
4228        return HTTP_BAD_REQUEST;
4229    }
4230
4231    /* check for add, set, or remove element */ view japanese
4232    if ((child = dav_find_child(doc->root, "add")) != NULL) {
4233        ctx.label_op = DAV_LABEL_ADD;
4234    }
4235    else if ((child = dav_find_child(doc->root, "set")) != NULL) {
4236        ctx.label_op = DAV_LABEL_SET;
4237    }
4238    else if ((child = dav_find_child(doc->root, "remove")) != NULL) {
4239        ctx.label_op = DAV_LABEL_REMOVE;
4240    }
4241    else {
4242        ap_log_rerror(APLOG_MARK, APLOG_ERR, 0, r, APLOGNO(00611)
4243                      "The \"label\" element does not contain "
4244                      "an \"add\", \"set\", or \"remove\" element.");
4245        return HTTP_BAD_REQUEST;
4246    }
4247
4248    /* get the label string */ view japanese
4249    if ((child = dav_find_child(child, "label-name")) == NULL) {
4250        ap_log_rerror(APLOG_MARK, APLOG_ERR, 0, r, APLOGNO(00612)
4251                      "The label command element does not contain "
4252                      "a \"label-name\" element.");
4253        return HTTP_BAD_REQUEST;
4254    }
4255
4256    apr_xml_to_text(r->pool, child, APR_XML_X2T_INNER, NULL, NULL,
4257                    &ctx.label, &tsize);
4258    if (tsize == 0) {
4259        ap_log_rerror(APLOG_MARK, APLOG_ERR, 0, r, APLOGNO(00613)
4260                      "A \"label-name\" element does not contain "
4261                      "a label name.");
4262        return HTTP_BAD_REQUEST;
4263    }
4264
4265    /* do the label operation walk */ view japanese
4266    ctx.w.walk_type = DAV_WALKTYPE_NORMAL;
4267    ctx.w.func = dav_label_walker;
4268    ctx.w.walk_ctx = &ctx;
4269    ctx.w.pool = r->pool;
4270    ctx.w.root = resource;
4271    ctx.r = r;
4272    ctx.vsn_hooks = vsn_hooks;
4273
4274    err = (*resource->hooks->walk)(&ctx.w, depth, &multi_status);
4275
4276    if (err != NULL) {
4277        /* some sort of error occurred which terminated the walk */ view japanese
4278        err = dav_push_error(r->pool, err->status, 0,
4279                             "The LABEL operation was terminated prematurely.",
4280                             err);
4281        return dav_handle_err(r, err, multi_status);
4282    }
4283
4284    if (multi_status != NULL) {
4285        /* One or more resources had errors. If depth was zero, convert
4286         * response to simple error, else make sure there is an
4287         * overall error to pass to dav_handle_err()
4288         */ view japanese
4289        if (depth == 0) {
4290            err = dav_new_error(r->pool, multi_status->status, 0, 0,
4291                                multi_status->desc);
4292            multi_status = NULL;
4293        }
4294        else {
4295            err = dav_new_error(r->pool, HTTP_MULTI_STATUS, 0, 0,
4296                                "Errors occurred during the LABEL operation.");
4297        }
4298
4299        return dav_handle_err(r, err, multi_status);
4300    }
4301
4302    /* set the Cache-Control header, per the spec */
4303    apr_table_setn(r->headers_out, "Cache-Control", "no-cache");
4304
4305    /* no body */ view japanese
4306    ap_set_content_length(r, 0);
4307
4308    return DONE;
4309}
4310
4311static int dav_core_deliver_report(request_rec *r,
4312                          const dav_resource *resource,
4313                          const apr_xml_doc *doc,
4314                          ap_filter_t *output, dav_error **err)
4315{
4316    const dav_hooks_vsn *vsn_hooks = DAV_GET_HOOKS_VSN(r);
4317
4318    if (vsn_hooks) {
4319        *err = (*vsn_hooks->deliver_report)(r, resource, doc,
4320                                            r->output_filters);
4321        return OK;
4322    }
4323
4324    return DECLINED;
4325}
4326
4327static void dav_core_gather_reports(
4328    request_rec *r,
4329    const dav_resource *resource,
4330    apr_array_header_t *reports,
4331    dav_error **err)
4332{
4333    const dav_hooks_vsn *vsn_hooks = DAV_GET_HOOKS_VSN(r);
4334
4335    if (vsn_hooks) {
4336        const dav_report_elem *rp;
4337
4338        (*err) = (*vsn_hooks->avail_reports)(resource, &rp);
4339        while (rp && rp->name) {
4340
4341            dav_report_elem *report = apr_array_push(reports);
4342
4343            report->nmspace = rp->nmspace;
4344            report->name = rp->name;
4345
4346            rp++;
4347        }
4348    }
4349
4350}
4351
4352static int dav_method_report(request_rec *r)
4353{
4354    dav_resource *resource;
4355    const dav_hooks_vsn *vsn_hooks = DAV_GET_HOOKS_VSN(r);
4356    apr_xml_doc *doc;
4357    dav_error *err = NULL;
4358
4359    int result;
4360    int label_allowed;
4361
4362    if ((result = ap_xml_parse_input(r, &doc)) != OK) {
4363        return result;
4364    }
4365    if (doc == NULL) {
4366        /* This supplies additional information for the default msg. */
4367        ap_log_rerror(APLOG_MARK, APLOG_ERR, 0, r, APLOGNO(00614)
4368                      "The request body must specify a report.");
4369        return HTTP_BAD_REQUEST;
4370    }
4371
4372    /* Ask repository module to resolve the resource.
4373     * First determine whether a Target-Selector header is allowed
4374     * for this report.
4375     */ view japanese
4376    label_allowed = vsn_hooks ? (*vsn_hooks->report_label_header_allowed)(doc) : 0;
4377    err = dav_get_resource(r, label_allowed, 0 /* use_checked_in */,
4378                           &resource);
4379    if (err != NULL) {
4380        return dav_handle_err(r, err, NULL);
4381    }
4382
4383    /* check for any method preconditions */
4384    if (dav_run_method_precondition(r, resource, NULL, doc, &err) != DECLINED
4385            && err) {
4386        return dav_handle_err(r, err, NULL);
4387    }
4388
4389    if (!resource->exists) {
4390        /* Apache will supply a default error for this. */
4391        return HTTP_NOT_FOUND;
4392    }
4393
4394    /* set up defaults for the report response */ view japanese
4395    r->status = HTTP_OK;
4396    ap_set_content_type(r, DAV_XML_CONTENT_TYPE);
4397    err = NULL;
4398
4399    /* run report hook */ view japanese
4400    result = dav_run_deliver_report(r, resource, doc,
4401            r->output_filters, &err);
4402    if (err != NULL) {
4403
4404        if (! r->sent_bodyct) {
4405          /* No data has been sent to client yet;  throw normal error. */ view japanese
4406          return dav_handle_err(r, err, NULL);
4407        }
4408
4409        /* If an error occurred during the report delivery, there's
4410           basically nothing we can do but abort the connection and
4411           log an error.  This is one of the limitations of HTTP; it
4412           needs to "know" the entire status of the response before
4413           generating it, which is just impossible in these streamy
4414           response situations. */ view japanese
4415        err = dav_push_error(r->pool, err->status, 0,
4416                             "Provider encountered an error while streaming"
4417                             " a REPORT response.", err);
4418        dav_log_err(r, err, APLOG_ERR);
4419        r->connection->aborted = 1;
4420
4421        return DONE;
4422    }
4423    switch (result) {
4424    case OK:
4425        return DONE;
4426    case DECLINED:
4427        /* No one handled the report */ view japanese
4428        return HTTP_NOT_IMPLEMENTED;
4429    default:
4430        return DONE;
4431    }
4432
4433    return DONE;
4434}
4435
4436static int dav_method_make_workspace(request_rec *r)
4437{
4438    dav_resource *resource;
4439    const dav_hooks_vsn *vsn_hooks = DAV_GET_HOOKS_VSN(r);
4440    dav_error *err;
4441    apr_xml_doc *doc;
4442    int result;
4443
4444    /* if no versioning provider, or the provider does not support workspaces,
4445     * decline the request
4446     */ view japanese
4447    if (vsn_hooks == NULL || vsn_hooks->make_workspace == NULL)
4448        return DECLINED;
4449
4450    /* ask repository module to resolve the resource */
4451    err = dav_get_resource(r, 0 /* label_allowed */, 0 /* use_checked_in */,
4452                           &resource);
4453    if (err != NULL)
4454        return dav_handle_err(r, err, NULL);
4455
4456    /* parse the request body (must be a mkworkspace element) */ view japanese
4457    if ((result = ap_xml_parse_input(r, &doc)) != OK) {
4458        return result;
4459    }
4460
4461    /* check for any method preconditions */
4462    if (dav_run_method_precondition(r, resource, NULL, doc, &err) != DECLINED
4463            && err) {
4464        return dav_handle_err(r, err, NULL);
4465    }
4466
4467    if (doc == NULL
4468        || !dav_validate_root(doc, "mkworkspace")) {
4469        ap_log_rerror(APLOG_MARK, APLOG_ERR, 0, r, APLOGNO(00615)
4470                      "The request body does not contain "
4471                      "a \"mkworkspace\" element.");
4472        return HTTP_BAD_REQUEST;
4473    }
4474
4475    /* Check request preconditions */
4476
4477    /* ### need a general mechanism for reporting precondition violations
4478     * ### (should be returning XML document for 403/409 responses)
4479     */
4480
4481    /* resource must not already exist */
4482    if (resource->exists) {
4483        err = dav_new_error(r->pool, HTTP_CONFLICT, 0, 0,
4484                            "<DAV:resource-must-be-null/>");
4485        return dav_handle_err(r, err, NULL);
4486    }
4487
4488    /* ### what about locking? */
4489
4490    /* attempt to create the workspace */ view japanese
4491    if ((err = (*vsn_hooks->make_workspace)(resource, doc)) != NULL) {
4492        err = dav_push_error(r->pool, err->status, 0,
4493                             apr_psprintf(r->pool,
4494                                          "Could not create workspace %s.",
4495                                          ap_escape_html(r->pool, r->uri)),
4496                             err);
4497        return dav_handle_err(r, err, NULL);
4498    }
4499
4500    /* set the Cache-Control header, per the spec */
4501    apr_table_setn(r->headers_out, "Cache-Control", "no-cache");
4502
4503    /* return an appropriate response (HTTP_CREATED) */
4504    return dav_created(r, resource->uri, "Workspace", 0 /*replaced*/);
4505}
4506
4507static int dav_method_make_activity(request_rec *r)
4508{
4509    dav_resource *resource;
4510    const dav_hooks_vsn *vsn_hooks = DAV_GET_HOOKS_VSN(r);
4511    dav_error *err;
4512    int result;
4513
4514    /* if no versioning provider, or the provider does not support activities,
4515     * decline the request
4516     */ view japanese
4517    if (vsn_hooks == NULL || vsn_hooks->make_activity == NULL)
4518        return DECLINED;
4519
4520    /* ask repository module to resolve the resource */ view japanese
4521    err = dav_get_resource(r, 0 /* label_allowed */, 0 /* use_checked_in */,
4522                           &resource);
4523    if (err != NULL)
4524        return dav_handle_err(r, err, NULL);
4525
4526    /* check for any method preconditions */
4527    if (dav_run_method_precondition(r, resource, NULL, NULL, &err) != DECLINED
4528            && err) {
4529        return dav_handle_err(r, err, NULL);
4530    }
4531
4532    /* MKACTIVITY does not have a defined request body. */ view japanese
4533    if ((result = ap_discard_request_body(r)) != OK) {
4534        return result;
4535    }
4536
4537    /* Check request preconditions */ view japanese
4538
4539    /* ### need a general mechanism for reporting precondition violations
4540     * ### (should be returning XML document for 403/409 responses)
4541     */ view japanese
4542
4543    /* resource must not already exist */ view japanese
4544    if (resource->exists) {
4545        err = dav_new_error(r->pool, HTTP_CONFLICT, 0, 0,
4546                            "<DAV:resource-must-be-null/>");
4547        return dav_handle_err(r, err, NULL);
4548    }
4549
4550    /* the provider must say whether the resource can be created as
4551       an activity, i.e. whether the location is ok.  */ view japanese
4552    if (vsn_hooks->can_be_activity != NULL
4553        && !(*vsn_hooks->can_be_activity)(resource)) {
4554      err = dav_new_error(r->pool, HTTP_FORBIDDEN, 0, 0,
4555                          "<DAV:activity-location-ok/>");
4556      return dav_handle_err(r, err, NULL);
4557    }
4558
4559    /* ### what about locking? */ view japanese
4560
4561    /* attempt to create the activity */ view japanese
4562    if ((err = (*vsn_hooks->make_activity)(resource)) != NULL) {
4563        err = dav_push_error(r->pool, err->status, 0,
4564                             apr_psprintf(r->pool,
4565                                          "Could not create activity %s.",
4566                                          ap_escape_html(r->pool, r->uri)),
4567                             err);
4568        return dav_handle_err(r, err, NULL);
4569    }
4570
4571    /* set the Cache-Control header, per the spec */
4572    apr_table_setn(r->headers_out, "Cache-Control", "no-cache");
4573
4574    /* return an appropriate response (HTTP_CREATED) */
4575    return dav_created(r, resource->uri, "Activity", 0 /*replaced*/); view japanese
4576}
4577
4578static int dav_method_baseline_control(request_rec *r)
4579{
4580    /* ### */ view japanese
4581    return HTTP_METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED;
4582}
4583
4584static int dav_method_merge(request_rec *r)
4585{
4586    dav_resource *resource;
4587    dav_resource *source_resource;
4588    const dav_hooks_vsn *vsn_hooks = DAV_GET_HOOKS_VSN(r);
4589    dav_error *err;
4590    int result;
4591    apr_xml_doc *doc;
4592    apr_xml_elem *source_elem;
4593    apr_xml_elem *href_elem;
4594    apr_xml_elem *prop_elem;
4595    const char *source;
4596    int no_auto_merge;
4597    int no_checkout;
4598    dav_lookup_result lookup;
4599
4600    /* If no versioning provider, decline the request */ view japanese
4601    if (vsn_hooks == NULL)
4602        return DECLINED;
4603
4604    if ((result = ap_xml_parse_input(r, &doc)) != OK)
4605        return result;
4606
4607    if (doc == NULL || !dav_validate_root(doc, "merge")) {
4608        /* This supplies additional information for the default msg. */
4609        ap_log_rerror(APLOG_MARK, APLOG_ERR, 0, r, APLOGNO(00616)
4610                      "The request body must be present and must be a "
4611                      "DAV:merge element.");
4612        return HTTP_BAD_REQUEST;
4613    }
4614
4615    if ((source_elem = dav_find_child(doc->root, "source")) == NULL) {
4616        /* This supplies additional information for the default msg. */
4617        ap_log_rerror(APLOG_MARK, APLOG_ERR, 0, r, APLOGNO(00617)
4618                      "The DAV:merge element must contain a DAV:source "
4619                      "element.");
4620        return HTTP_BAD_REQUEST;
4621    }
4622    if ((href_elem = dav_find_child(source_elem, "href")) == NULL) {
4623        /* This supplies additional information for the default msg. */ view japanese
4624        ap_log_rerror(APLOG_MARK, APLOG_ERR, 0, r, APLOGNO(00618)
4625                      "The DAV:source element must contain a DAV:href "
4626                      "element.");
4627        return HTTP_BAD_REQUEST;
4628    }
4629    source = dav_xml_get_cdata(href_elem, r->pool, 1 /* strip_white */); view japanese
4630
4631    /* get a subrequest for the source, so that we can get a dav_resource
4632       for that source. */ view japanese
4633    lookup = dav_lookup_uri(source, r, 0 /* must_be_absolute */);
4634    if (lookup.rnew == NULL) {
4635        if (lookup.err.status == HTTP_BAD_REQUEST) {
4636            /* This supplies additional information for the default message. */
4637            ap_log_rerror(APLOG_MARK, APLOG_ERR, 0, r, APLOGNO(00619)
4638                          "%s", lookup.err.desc);
4639            return HTTP_BAD_REQUEST;
4640        }
4641
4642        /* ### this assumes that dav_lookup_uri() only generates a status
4643         * ### that Apache can provide a status line for!! */
4644
4645        return dav_error_response(r, lookup.err.status, lookup.err.desc);
4646    }
4647    if (lookup.rnew->status != HTTP_OK) {
4648        /* ### how best to report this... */
4649        return dav_error_response(r, lookup.rnew->status,
4650                                  "Merge source URI had an error.");
4651    }
4652    err = dav_get_resource(lookup.rnew, 0 /* label_allowed */,
4653                           0 /* use_checked_in */, &source_resource);
4654    if (err != NULL)
4655        return dav_handle_err(r, err, NULL);
4656
4657    /* check for any method preconditions */
4658    if (dav_run_method_precondition(r, source_resource, NULL, doc, &err) != DECLINED
4659            && err) {
4660        return dav_handle_err(r, err, NULL);
4661    }
4662
4663    no_auto_merge = dav_find_child(doc->root, "no-auto-merge") != NULL;
4664    no_checkout = dav_find_child(doc->root, "no-checkout") != NULL;
4665
4666    prop_elem = dav_find_child(doc->root, "prop");
4667
4668    /* ### check RFC. I believe the DAV:merge element may contain any
4669       ### element also allowed within DAV:checkout. need to extract them
4670       ### here, and pass them along.
4671       ### if so, then refactor the CHECKOUT method handling so we can reuse
4672       ### the code. maybe create a structure to hold CHECKOUT parameters
4673       ### which can be passed to the checkout() and merge() hooks. */ view japanese
4674
4675    /* Ask repository module to resolve the resource */
4676    err = dav_get_resource(r, 0 /* label_allowed */, 0 /* use_checked_in */,
4677                           &resource);
4678    if (err != NULL)
4679        return dav_handle_err(r, err, NULL);
4680
4681    /* check for any method preconditions */
4682    if (dav_run_method_precondition(r, source_resource, resource, doc, &err) != DECLINED
4683            && err) {
4684        return dav_handle_err(r, err, NULL);
4685    }
4686
4687    if (!resource->exists) {
4688        /* Apache will supply a default error for this. */
4689        return HTTP_NOT_FOUND;
4690    }
4691
4692    /* ### check the source and target resources flags/types */ view japanese
4693
4694    /* ### do lock checks, once behavior is defined */ view japanese
4695
4696    /* set the Cache-Control header, per the spec */ view japanese
4697    /* ### correct? */ view japanese
4698    apr_table_setn(r->headers_out, "Cache-Control", "no-cache");
4699
4700    /* Initialize these values for a standard MERGE response. If the MERGE
4701       is going to do something different (i.e. an error), then it must
4702       return a dav_error, and we'll reset these values properly. */ view japanese
4703    r->status = HTTP_OK;
4704    ap_set_content_type(r, "text/xml");
4705
4706    /* ### should we do any preliminary response generation? probably not,
4707       ### because we may have an error, thus demanding something else in
4708       ### the response body. */ view japanese
4709
4710    /* Do the merge, including any response generation. */ view japanese
4711    if ((err = (*vsn_hooks->merge)(resource, source_resource,
4712                                   no_auto_merge, no_checkout,
4713                                   prop_elem,
4714                                   r->output_filters)) != NULL) {
4715        /* ### is err->status the right error here? */ view japanese
4716        err = dav_push_error(r->pool, err->status, 0,
4717                             apr_psprintf(r->pool,
4718                                          "Could not MERGE resource \"%s\" "
4719                                          "into \"%s\".",
4720                                          ap_escape_html(r->pool, source),
4721                                          ap_escape_html(r->pool, r->uri)),
4722                             err);
4723        return dav_handle_err(r, err, NULL);
4724    }
4725
4726    /* the response was fully generated by the merge() hook. */ view japanese
4727    /* ### urk. does this prevent logging? need to check... */ view japanese
4728    return DONE;
4729}
4730
4731static int dav_method_bind(request_rec *r)
4732{
4733    dav_resource *resource;
4734    dav_resource *binding;
4735    dav_auto_version_info av_info;
4736    const dav_hooks_binding *binding_hooks = DAV_GET_HOOKS_BINDING(r);
4737    const char *dest;
4738    dav_error *err;
4739    dav_error *err2;
4740    dav_response *multi_response = NULL;
4741    dav_lookup_result lookup;
4742    int overwrite;
4743
4744    /* If no bindings provider, decline the request */ view japanese
4745    if (binding_hooks == NULL)
4746        return DECLINED;
4747
4748    /* Ask repository module to resolve the resource */ view japanese
4749    err = dav_get_resource(r, 0 /* label_allowed */, 0 /* use_checked_in */,
4750                           &resource);
4751    if (err != NULL)
4752        return dav_handle_err(r, err, NULL);
4753
4754    /* check for any method preconditions */
4755    if (dav_run_method_precondition(r, resource, NULL, NULL, &err) != DECLINED
4756            && err) {
4757        return dav_handle_err(r, err, NULL);
4758    }
4759
4760    if (!resource->exists) {
4761        /* Apache will supply a default error for this. */ view japanese
4762        return HTTP_NOT_FOUND;
4763    }
4764
4765    /* get the destination URI */ view japanese
4766    dest = apr_table_get(r->headers_in, "Destination");
4767    if (dest == NULL) {
4768        /* This supplies additional information for the default message. */
4769        ap_log_rerror(APLOG_MARK, APLOG_ERR, 0, r, APLOGNO(00620)
4770                      "The request is missing a Destination header.");
4771        return HTTP_BAD_REQUEST;
4772    }
4773
4774    lookup = dav_lookup_uri(dest, r, 0 /* must_be_absolute */); view japanese
4775    if (lookup.rnew == NULL) {
4776        if (lookup.err.status == HTTP_BAD_REQUEST) {
4777            /* This supplies additional information for the default message. */ view japanese
4778            ap_log_rerror(APLOG_MARK, APLOG_ERR, 0, r, APLOGNO(00621)
4779                          "%s", lookup.err.desc);
4780            return HTTP_BAD_REQUEST;
4781        }
4782        else if (lookup.err.status == HTTP_BAD_GATEWAY) {
4783            /* ### Bindings protocol draft 02 says to return 507
4784             * ### (Cross Server Binding Forbidden); Apache already defines 507
4785             * ### as HTTP_INSUFFICIENT_STORAGE. So, for now, we'll return
4786             * ### HTTP_FORBIDDEN
4787             */ view japanese
4788             return dav_error_response(r, HTTP_FORBIDDEN,
4789                                       "Cross server bindings are not "
4790                                       "allowed by this server.");
4791        }
4792
4793        /* ### this assumes that dav_lookup_uri() only generates a status
4794         * ### that Apache can provide a status line for!! */ view japanese
4795
4796        return dav_error_response(r, lookup.err.status, lookup.err.desc);
4797    }
4798    if (lookup.rnew->status != HTTP_OK) {
4799        /* ### how best to report this... */ view japanese
4800        return dav_error_response(r, lookup.rnew->status,
4801                                  "Destination URI had an error.");
4802    }
4803
4804    /* resolve binding resource */ view japanese
4805    err = dav_get_resource(lookup.rnew, 0 /* label_allowed */, view japanese
4806                           0 /* use_checked_in */, &binding); view japanese
4807    if (err != NULL)
4808        return dav_handle_err(r, err, NULL);
4809
4810    /* check for any method preconditions */ view japanese
4811    if (dav_run_method_precondition(r, resource, binding, NULL, &err) != DECLINED
4812            && err) {
4813        return dav_handle_err(r, err, NULL);
4814    }
4815
4816    /* are the two resources handled by the same repository? */ view japanese
4817    if (resource->hooks != binding->hooks) {
4818        /* ### this message exposes some backend config, but screw it... */ view japanese
4819        return dav_error_response(r, HTTP_BAD_GATEWAY,
4820                                  "Destination URI is handled by a "
4821                                  "different repository than the source URI. "
4822                                  "BIND between repositories is not possible.");
4823    }
4824
4825    /* get and parse the overwrite header value */ view japanese
4826    if ((overwrite = dav_get_overwrite(r)) < 0) {
4827        /* dav_get_overwrite() supplies additional information for the
4828         * default message. */ view japanese
4829        return HTTP_BAD_REQUEST;
4830    }
4831
4832    /* quick failure test: if dest exists and overwrite is false. */ view japanese
4833    if (binding->exists && !overwrite) {
4834        return dav_error_response(r, HTTP_PRECONDITION_FAILED,
4835                                  "Destination is not empty and "
4836                                  "Overwrite is not \"T\"");
4837    }
4838
4839    /* are the source and destination the same? */ view japanese
4840    if ((*resource->hooks->is_same_resource)(resource, binding)) {
4841        return dav_error_response(r, HTTP_FORBIDDEN,
4842                                  "Source and Destination URIs are the same.");
4843    }
4844
4845    /*
4846     * Check If-Headers and existing locks for destination. Note that we
4847     * use depth==infinity since the target (hierarchy) will be deleted
4848     * before the move/copy is completed.
4849     *
4850     * Note that we are overwriting the target, which implies a DELETE, so
4851     * we are subject to the error/response rules as a DELETE. Namely, we
4852     * will return a 424 error if any of the validations fail.
4853     * (see dav_method_delete() for more information)
4854     */ view japanese
4855    if ((err = dav_validate_request(lookup.rnew, binding, DAV_INFINITY, NULL,
4856                                    &multi_response,
4857                                    DAV_VALIDATE_PARENT
4858                                    | DAV_VALIDATE_USE_424, NULL)) != NULL) {
4859        err = dav_push_error(r->pool, err->status, 0,
4860                             apr_psprintf(r->pool,
4861                                          "Could not BIND %s due to a "
4862                                          "failed precondition on the "
4863                                          "destination (e.g. locks).",
4864                                          ap_escape_html(r->pool, r->uri)),
4865                             err);
4866        return dav_handle_err(r, err, multi_response);
4867    }
4868
4869    /* guard against creating circular bindings */ view japanese
4870    if (resource->collection
4871        && (*resource->hooks->is_parent_resource)(resource, binding)) {
4872        return dav_error_response(r, HTTP_FORBIDDEN,
4873                                  "Source collection contains the Destination.");
4874    }
4875    if (resource->collection
4876        && (*resource->hooks->is_parent_resource)(binding, resource)) {
4877        /* The destination must exist (since it contains the source), and
4878         * a condition above implies Overwrite==T. Obviously, we cannot
4879         * delete the Destination before the BIND, as that would
4880         * delete the Source.
4881         */ view japanese
4882
4883        return dav_error_response(r, HTTP_FORBIDDEN,
4884                                  "Destination collection contains the Source and "
4885                                  "Overwrite has been specified.");
4886    }
4887
4888    /* prepare the destination collection for modification */ view japanese
4889    if ((err = dav_auto_checkout(r, binding, 1 /* parent_only */, view japanese
4890                                 &av_info)) != NULL) {
4891        /* could not make destination writable */ view japanese
4892        return dav_handle_err(r, err, NULL);
4893    }
4894
4895    /* If target exists, remove it first (we know Ovewrite must be TRUE).
4896     * Then try to bind to the resource.
4897     */ view japanese
4898    if (binding->exists)
4899        err = (*resource->hooks->remove_resource)(binding, &multi_response);
4900
4901    if (err == NULL) {
4902        err = (*binding_hooks->bind_resource)(resource, binding);
4903    }
4904
4905    /* restore parent collection states */ view japanese
4906    err2 = dav_auto_checkin(r, NULL,
4907                            err != NULL /* undo if error */, view japanese
4908                            0 /* unlock */, &av_info); view japanese
4909
4910    /* check for error from remove/bind operations */ view japanese
4911    if (err != NULL) {
4912        err = dav_push_error(r->pool, err->status, 0,
4913                             apr_psprintf(r->pool,
4914                                          "Could not BIND %s.",
4915                                          ap_escape_html(r->pool, r->uri)),
4916                             err);
4917        return dav_handle_err(r, err, multi_response);
4918    }
4919
4920    /* check for errors from reverting writability */ view japanese
4921    if (err2 != NULL) {
4922        /* just log a warning */ view japanese
4923        err = dav_push_error(r->pool, err2->status, 0,
4924                             "The BIND was successful, but there was a "
4925                             "problem automatically checking in the "
4926                             "source parent collection.",
4927                             err2);
4928        dav_log_err(r, err, APLOG_WARNING);
4929    }
4930
4931    /* return an appropriate response (HTTP_CREATED) */ view japanese
4932    /* ### spec doesn't say what happens when destination was replaced */ view japanese
4933    return dav_created(r, lookup.rnew->unparsed_uri, "Binding", 0);
4934}
4935
4936
4937/*
4938 * Response handler for DAV resources
4939 */ view japanese
4940static int dav_handler(request_rec *r)
4941{
4942    if (strcmp(r->handler, DAV_HANDLER_NAME) != 0)
4943        return DECLINED;
4944
4945    /* Reject requests with an unescaped hash character, as these may
4946     * be more destructive than the user intended. */ view japanese
4947    if (r->parsed_uri.fragment != NULL) {
4948        ap_log_rerror(APLOG_MARK, APLOG_ERR, 0, r, APLOGNO(00622)
4949                     "buggy client used un-escaped hash in Request-URI");
4950        return dav_error_response(r, HTTP_BAD_REQUEST,
4951                                  "The request was invalid: the URI included "
4952                                  "an un-escaped hash character");
4953    }
4954
4955    /* ### do we need to do anything with r->proxyreq ?? */ view japanese
4956
4957    /*
4958     * ### anything else to do here? could another module and/or
4959     * ### config option "take over" the handler here? i.e. how do
4960     * ### we lock down this hierarchy so that we are the ultimate
4961     * ### arbiter? (or do we simply depend on the administrator
4962     * ### to avoid conflicting configurations?)
4963     */ view japanese
4964
4965    /*
4966     * Set up the methods mask, since that's one of the reasons this handler
4967     * gets called, and lower-level things may need the info.
4968     *
4969     * First, set the mask to the methods we handle directly.  Since by
4970     * definition we own our managed space, we unconditionally set
4971     * the r->allowed field rather than ORing our values with anything
4972     * any other module may have put in there.
4973     *
4974     * These are the HTTP-defined methods that we handle directly.
4975     */ view japanese
4976    r->allowed = 0
4977        | (AP_METHOD_BIT << M_GET)
4978        | (AP_METHOD_BIT << M_PUT)
4979        | (AP_METHOD_BIT << M_DELETE)
4980        | (AP_METHOD_BIT << M_OPTIONS)
4981        | (AP_METHOD_BIT << M_INVALID);
4982
4983    /*
4984     * These are the DAV methods we handle.
4985     */ view japanese
4986    r->allowed |= 0
4987        | (AP_METHOD_BIT << M_COPY)
4988        | (AP_METHOD_BIT << M_LOCK)
4989        | (AP_METHOD_BIT << M_UNLOCK)
4990        | (AP_METHOD_BIT << M_MKCOL)
4991        | (AP_METHOD_BIT << M_MOVE)
4992        | (AP_METHOD_BIT << M_PROPFIND)
4993        | (AP_METHOD_BIT << M_PROPPATCH);
4994
4995    /*
4996     * These are methods that we don't handle directly, but let the
4997     * server's default handler do for us as our agent.
4998     */ view japanese
4999    r->allowed |= 0
5000        | (AP_METHOD_BIT << M_POST);
5001
5002    /* ### hrm. if we return HTTP_METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED, then an Allow header
5003     * ### is sent; it will need the other allowed states; since the default
5004     * ### handler is not called on error, then it doesn't add the other
5005     * ### allowed states, so we must
5006     */ view japanese
5007
5008    /* ### we might need to refine this for just where we return the error.
5009     * ### also, there is the issue with other methods (see ISSUES)
5010     */ view japanese
5011
5012    /* dispatch the appropriate method handler */ view japanese
5013    if (r->method_number == M_GET) {
5014        return dav_method_get(r);
5015    }
5016
5017    if (r->method_number == M_PUT) {
5018        return dav_method_put(r);
5019    }
5020
5021    if (r->method_number == M_POST) {
5022        return dav_method_post(r);
5023    }
5024
5025    if (r->method_number == M_DELETE) {
5026        return dav_method_delete(r);
5027    }
5028
5029    if (r->method_number == M_OPTIONS) {
5030        return dav_method_options(r);
5031    }
5032
5033    if (r->method_number == M_PROPFIND) {
5034        return dav_method_propfind(r);
5035    }
5036
5037    if (r->method_number == M_PROPPATCH) {
5038        return dav_method_proppatch(r);
5039    }
5040
5041    if (r->method_number == M_MKCOL) {
5042        return dav_method_mkcol(r);
5043    }
5044
5045    if (r->method_number == M_COPY) {
5046        return dav_method_copymove(r, DAV_DO_COPY);
5047    }
5048
5049    if (r->method_number == M_MOVE) {
5050        return dav_method_copymove(r, DAV_DO_MOVE);
5051    }
5052
5053    if (r->method_number == M_LOCK) {
5054        return dav_method_lock(r);
5055    }
5056
5057    if (r->method_number == M_UNLOCK) {
5058        return dav_method_unlock(r);
5059    }
5060
5061    if (r->method_number == M_VERSION_CONTROL) {
5062        return dav_method_vsn_control(r);
5063    }
5064
5065    if (r->method_number == M_CHECKOUT) {
5066        return dav_method_checkout(r);
5067    }
5068
5069    if (r->method_number == M_UNCHECKOUT) {
5070        return dav_method_uncheckout(r);
5071    }
5072
5073    if (r->method_number == M_CHECKIN) {
5074        return dav_method_checkin(r);
5075    }
5076
5077    if (r->method_number == M_UPDATE) {
5078        return dav_method_update(r);
5079    }
5080
5081    if (r->method_number == M_LABEL) {
5082        return dav_method_label(r);
5083    }
5084
5085    if (r->method_number == M_REPORT) {
5086        return dav_method_report(r);
5087    }
5088
5089    if (r->method_number == M_MKWORKSPACE) {
5090        return dav_method_make_workspace(r);
5091    }
5092
5093    if (r->method_number == M_MKACTIVITY) {
5094        return dav_method_make_activity(r);
5095    }
5096
5097    if (r->method_number == M_BASELINE_CONTROL) {
5098        return dav_method_baseline_control(r);
5099    }
5100
5101    if (r->method_number == M_MERGE) {
5102        return dav_method_merge(r);
5103    }
5104
5105    /* BIND method */ view japanese
5106    if (r->method_number == dav_methods[DAV_M_BIND]) {
5107        return dav_method_bind(r);
5108    }
5109
5110    /* DASL method */ view japanese
5111    if (r->method_number == dav_methods[DAV_M_SEARCH]) {
5112        return dav_method_search(r);
5113    }
5114
5115    /* ### add'l methods for Advanced Collections, ACLs */ view japanese
5116
5117    return DECLINED;
5118}
5119
5120static int dav_fixups(request_rec *r)
5121{
5122    dav_dir_conf *conf;
5123
5124    /* quickly ignore any HTTP/0.9 requests which aren't subreqs. */ view japanese
5125    if (r->assbackwards && !r->main) {
5126        return DECLINED;
5127    }
5128
5129    conf = (dav_dir_conf *)ap_get_module_config(r->per_dir_config,
5130                                                &dav_module);
5131
5132    /* if DAV is not enabled, then we've got nothing to do */ view japanese
5133    if (conf->provider == NULL) {
5134        return DECLINED;
5135    }
5136
5137    /* We are going to handle almost every request. In certain cases,
5138       the provider maps to the filesystem (thus, handle_get is
5139       FALSE), and core Apache will handle it. a For that case, we
5140       just return right away.  */ view japanese
5141    if (r->method_number == M_GET) {
5142        /*
5143         * ### need some work to pull Content-Type and Content-Language
5144         * ### from the property database.
5145         */ view japanese
5146
5147        /*
5148         * If the repository hasn't indicated that it will handle the
5149         * GET method, then just punt.
5150         *
5151         * ### this isn't quite right... taking over the response can break
5152         * ### things like mod_negotiation. need to look into this some more.
5153         */ view japanese
5154        if (!conf->provider->repos->handle_get) {
5155            return DECLINED;
5156        }
5157    }
5158
5159    /* ### this is wrong.  We should only be setting the r->handler for the
5160     * requests that mod_dav knows about.  If we set the handler for M_POST
5161     * requests, then CGI scripts that use POST will return the source for the
5162     * script.  However, mod_dav DOES handle POST, so something else needs
5163     * to be fixed.
5164     */ view japanese
5165    if (r->method_number != M_POST) {
5166
5167        /* We are going to be handling the response for this resource. */ view japanese
5168        r->handler = DAV_HANDLER_NAME;
5169        return OK;
5170    }
5171
5172    return DECLINED;
5173}
5174
5175static void register_hooks(apr_pool_t *p)
5176{
5177    ap_hook_handler(dav_handler, NULL, NULL, APR_HOOK_MIDDLE);
5178    ap_hook_post_config(dav_init_handler, NULL, NULL, APR_HOOK_MIDDLE);
5179    ap_hook_fixups(dav_fixups, NULL, NULL, APR_HOOK_MIDDLE);
5180
5181    dav_hook_find_liveprop(dav_core_find_liveprop, NULL, NULL, APR_HOOK_LAST);
5182    dav_hook_insert_all_liveprops(dav_core_insert_all_liveprops,
5183                                  NULL, NULL, APR_HOOK_MIDDLE);
5184
5185    dav_hook_deliver_report(dav_core_deliver_report,
5186                            NULL, NULL, APR_HOOK_LAST);
5187    dav_hook_gather_reports(dav_core_gather_reports,
5188                            NULL, NULL, APR_HOOK_LAST);
5189
5190    dav_core_register_uris(p);
5191}
5192
5193/*---------------------------------------------------------------------------
5194 *
5195 * Configuration info for the module
5196 */ view japanese
5197
5198static const command_rec dav_cmds[] =
5199{
5200    /* per directory/location */
5201    AP_INIT_TAKE1("DAV", dav_cmd_dav, NULL, ACCESS_CONF,
5202                  "specify the DAV provider for a directory or location"),
5203
5204    /* per directory/location */ view japanese
5205    AP_INIT_TAKE1("DAVBasePath", dav_cmd_davbasepath, NULL, ACCESS_CONF,
5206                  "specify the DAV repository base URL"),
5207
5208    /* per directory/location, or per server */
5209    AP_INIT_TAKE1("DAVMinTimeout", dav_cmd_davmintimeout, NULL,
5210                  ACCESS_CONF|RSRC_CONF,
5211                  "specify minimum allowed timeout"),
5212
5213    /* per directory/location, or per server */
5214    AP_INIT_FLAG("DAVDepthInfinity", dav_cmd_davdepthinfinity, NULL,
5215                 ACCESS_CONF|RSRC_CONF,
5216                 "allow Depth infinity PROPFIND requests"),
5217
5218    /* per directory/location, or per server */ view japanese
5219    AP_INIT_FLAG("DAVLockDiscovery", dav_cmd_davlockdiscovery, NULL,
5220                 ACCESS_CONF|RSRC_CONF,
5221                 "allow lock discovery by PROPFIND requests"),
5222
5223    { NULL }
5224};
5225
5226module DAV_DECLARE_DATA dav_module =
5227{
5228    STANDARD20_MODULE_STUFF,
5229    dav_create_dir_config,      /* dir config creater */ view japanese
5230    dav_merge_dir_config,       /* dir merger --- default is to override */ view japanese
5231    dav_create_server_config,   /* server config */ view japanese
5232    dav_merge_server_config,    /* merge server config */ view japanese
5233    dav_cmds,                   /* command table */ view japanese
5234    register_hooks,             /* register hooks */ view japanese
5235};
5236
5237APR_HOOK_STRUCT(
5238    APR_HOOK_LINK(gather_propsets)
5239    APR_HOOK_LINK(find_liveprop)
5240    APR_HOOK_LINK(insert_all_liveprops)
5241    APR_HOOK_LINK(deliver_report)
5242    APR_HOOK_LINK(gather_reports)
5243    APR_HOOK_LINK(method_precondition)
5244    )
5245
5246APR_IMPLEMENT_EXTERNAL_HOOK_VOID(dav, DAV, gather_propsets,
5247                                 (apr_array_header_t *uris),
5248                                 (uris))
5249
5250APR_IMPLEMENT_EXTERNAL_HOOK_RUN_FIRST(dav, DAV, int, find_liveprop,
5251                                      (const dav_resource *resource,
5252                                       const char *ns_uri, const char *name,
5253                                       const dav_hooks_liveprop **hooks),
5254                                      (resource, ns_uri, name, hooks), 0)
5255
5256APR_IMPLEMENT_EXTERNAL_HOOK_VOID(dav, DAV, insert_all_liveprops,
5257                                 (request_rec *r, const dav_resource *resource,
5258                                  dav_prop_insert what, apr_text_header *phdr),
5259                                 (r, resource, what, phdr))
5260
5261APR_IMPLEMENT_EXTERNAL_HOOK_RUN_FIRST(dav, DAV, int, deliver_report,
5262                                      (request_rec *r,
5263                                       const dav_resource *resource,
5264                                       const apr_xml_doc *doc,
5265                                       ap_filter_t *output, dav_error **err),
5266                                      (r, resource, doc, output, err), DECLINED)
5267
5268APR_IMPLEMENT_EXTERNAL_HOOK_VOID(dav, DAV, gather_reports,
5269                                   (request_rec *r, const dav_resource *resource,
5270                                    apr_array_header_t *reports, dav_error **err),
5271                                   (r, resource, reports, err))
5272
5273APR_IMPLEMENT_EXTERNAL_HOOK_RUN_FIRST(dav, DAV, int, method_precondition,
5274                                      (request_rec *r,
5275                                       dav_resource *src, const dav_resource *dest,
5276                                       const apr_xml_doc *doc,
5277                                       dav_error **err),
5278                                       (r, src, dest, doc, err), DECLINED)

Japanese translation

modules/dav/main/mod_dav.c:17-43

/*
 * Apache 2.0 用 DAV 拡張モジュール。
 *
 * このモジュールはリポジトリに依存しません。リポジトリ実装によって提供されるフックに依存します。
 *
 * APACHE の課題:
 *   - DAV 階層内で未知のメソッドが使用され、Apache の実装にフォールバックした場合、
 *     誤ったメソッドセットを含む OPTIONS が返されます。これに対処するためのフックが存在しません。
 *     そのため、HTTP_METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED および HTTP_NOT_IMPLEMENTED レスポンスを
 *     （ap_send_error_response ではなく）手動で処理する必要があります。
 *   - process_mkcol_body() は ap_setup_client_block() のコードを複製する必要がありました。
 *   - 任意のステータスコードに対して Apache からステータスラインを取得できると便利です。
 *   - Apache のレスポンスコードセットを拡張し、r->status に未知のコードが設定された際に
 *     500 を返さないようにできると便利です。
 *   - http_vhost 関数はパラメータに "const" を適用すべきです。
 *
 * 設計上の注意:
 *   - PROPFIND については、レスポンスを送信する前にメモリ内で全体をバッチ処理します。
 *     propdb から情報を取得する際に、その都度送信するように再構成したい場合があります。
 *     あるいは、メモリ内でバッファリングを行うのであれば、接続を維持できるように
 *     少なくとも合計の Content-Length を生成すべきです。
 */

Original comment

/*
 * DAV extension module for Apache 2.0.*
 *
 * This module is repository-independent. It depends on hooks provided by a
 * repository implementation.
 *
 * APACHE ISSUES:
 *   - within a DAV hierarchy, if an unknown method is used and we default
 *     to Apache's implementation, it sends back an OPTIONS with the wrong
 *     set of methods -- there is NO HOOK for us.
 *     therefore: we need to manually handle the HTTP_METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED
 *       and HTTP_NOT_IMPLEMENTED responses (not ap_send_error_response).
 *   - process_mkcol_body() had to dup code from ap_setup_client_block().
 *   - it would be nice to get status lines from Apache for arbitrary
 *     status codes
 *   - it would be nice to be able to extend Apache's set of response
 *     codes so that it doesn't return 500 when an unknown code is placed
 *     into r->status.
 *   - http_vhost functions should apply "const" to their params
 *
 * DESIGN NOTES:
 *   - For PROPFIND, we batch up the entire response in memory before
 *     sending it. We may want to reorganize around sending the information
 *     as we suck it in from the propdb. Alternatively, we should at least
 *     generate a total Content-Length if we're going to buffer in memory
 *     so that we can keep the connection open.
 */

Japanese translation

/* apr_is* 用 */

Japanese translation

modules/dav/main/mod_dav.c:116

modules/dav/main/mod_dav.c:351-359

/*
** dav_error_response()
**
** ユーザーに適切なレスポンスを返します。多くの場合、Apacheでは何が起きたかについての詳細をボディに含めることは許可されていません。この関数を使用すると、レスポンスボディを完全に指定することができます。
**
** ### この関数はエラーをログに記録しません！（例：ボディの内容など）
*/

Original comment

/*
** dav_error_response()
**
** Send a nice response back to the user. In most cases, Apache doesn't
** allow us to provide details in the body about what happened. This
** function allows us to completely specify the response body.
**
** ### this function is not logging any errors! (e.g. the body)
*/

Japanese translation

/* レスポンスを開始します... */

Original comment

/* begin the response now... */

Japanese translation

Original comment

/* the response has been sent. */

Japanese translation

     */

Original comment

/*

     */

Japanese translation

 * エラーのnamespaceとtagに基づいて「標準化された」エラーレスポンスを送信する

Original comment

/*
 * Send a "standardized" error response based on the error's namespace & tag
 */

Japanese translation

Japanese translation

modules/dav/main/mod_dav.c:455-459

/*
 * ApacheのURIエスケープは、'&'がURI内の有効な文字（クエリセクションを形成するため）であるため、これを置換しません。
 * XMLドキュメントにURIを埋め込めるように、明示的に処理する必要があります。
 */

Original comment

/*
 * Apache's URI escaping does not replace '&' since that is a valid character
 * in a URI (to form a query section). We must explicitly handle it so that
 * we can embed the URI into an XML document.
 */

Japanese translation

modules/dav/main/mod_dav.c:464

/* 簡単なケースを確認する... */

Original comment

/* check the easy case... */

Japanese translation

modules/dav/main/mod_dav.c:468

/* '&' があったため、さらなる作業が必要です... はぁ。 */

Original comment

/* there was a '&', so more work is needed... sigh. */

Japanese translation

modules/dav/main/mod_dav.c:470-473

/*
     * 注: '<' や '>' 文字が含まれていないことは分かっているため、
     * ほんの少しやりすぎではありますが、気にしないことにします。
     */

Original comment

/*
     * Note: this is a teeny bit of overkill since we know there are no
     * '<' or '>' characters, but who cares.
     */

Japanese translation

modules/dav/main/mod_dav.c:478-485

/* 完全な RESPONSE オブジェクトを <DAV:response> xml 要素として書き出します。
   データは brigade BB に送信され、リクエスト R の出力フィルター・スタックに自動的にフラッシュされます。
   一時的な割り当てには POOL を使用してください。

   [おそらく <multistatus> タグは既に書き込まれています。このルーチンは dav_send_multistatus と dav_stream_response によって共有されます。]
*/

Original comment

/* Write a complete RESPONSE object out as a <DAV:response> xml
   element.  Data is sent into brigade BB, which is auto-flushed into
   the output filter stack for request R.  Use POOL for any temporary
   allocations.

   [Presumably the <multistatus> tag has already been written;  this
   routine is shared by dav_send_multistatus and dav_stream_response.]
*/

Japanese translation

modules/dav/main/mod_dav.c:511-514

/* ApacheのStatus-Lineテキストを使用する。なお、first->statusが
       * 既知の（または有効な）ステータスコードでない場合は、
       * デフォルトで500 Internal Server Errorとなる。
       */

Original comment

/* use the Status-Line text from Apache.  Note, this will
       * default to 500 Internal Server Error if first->status
       * is not a known (or valid) status code.
       */

Japanese translation

Original comment

/* assume this includes <propstat> and is quoted properly */

Japanese translation

       */

       * have any escaping/encoding applied to it.
       */

Japanese translation

modules/dav/main/mod_dav.c:544-547

/* マルチステータス応答用に request_rec R を準備し、<multistatus> タグを R->output_filters 宛ての BB に書き込むための因子分解されたヘルパー関数。NAMESPACES が NULL でない場合は、初期タグ内でそれを使用する。 */

Original comment

/* Factorized helper function: prep request_rec R for a multistatus
   response and write <multistatus> tag into BB, destined for
   R->output_filters.  Use xml NAMESPACES in initial tag, if
   non-NULL. */

modules/dav/main/mod_dav.c:631-643

/*
 * dav_handle_err()
 *
 * 標準的なエラー処理を行います。<err> は NULL であってはなりません。
 *
 * <response> は以下によって設定されます。
 *   - dav_validate_request()
 *   - dav_add_lock()
 *   - repos_hooks->remove_resource
 *   - repos_hooks->move_resource
 *   - repos_hooks->copy_resource
 *   - vsn_hooks->update
 */

Original comment

/*
 * dav_handle_err()
 *
 * Handle the standard error processing. <err> must be non-NULL.
 *
 * <response> is set by the following:
 *   - dav_validate_request()
 *   - dav_add_lock()
 *   - repos_hooks->remove_resource
 *   - repos_hooks->move_resource
 *   - repos_hooks->copy_resource
 *   - vsn_hooks->update
 */

Japanese translation

     * default message that Apache provides. */

Original comment

Japanese translation

modules/dav/main/mod_dav.c:759-767

/* リクエストURIをリソース記述子に解決する。
 *
 * label_allowed != 0 の場合、Label: ヘッダーによってリクエストターゲットを変更することを許可する。
 *
 * use_checked_in が true の場合、リポジトリプロバイダーは、Request-URI で識別されるリソースの
 * DAV:checked-in プロパティによって識別されるリソースを返す必要がある。
 */

Original comment

/* resolve a request URI to a resource descriptor.
 *
 * If label_allowed != 0, then allow the request target to be altered by
 * a Label: header.
 *
 * If use_checked_in is true, then the repository provider should return
 * the resource identified by the DAV:checked-in property of the resource
 * identified by the Request-URI.
 */

Japanese translation

modules/dav/main/mod_dav.c:775

/* リクエストターゲットを上書きできる場合は、ターゲットセレクターを取得する */

Original comment

/* if the request target can be overridden, get any target selector */

Japanese translation

modules/dav/main/mod_dav.c:987

/* PUTメソッドを処理する */

Original comment

/* handle the PUT method */

Japanese translation

modules/dav/main/mod_dav.c:1016

/* ファイルリソースでもコレクションリソースでもない場合、PUTは許可されません */

Original comment

/* If not a file or collection resource, PUT not allowed */

Japanese translation

modules/dav/main/mod_dav.c:1025

/* コレクションに対してPUTはできません */

Original comment

/* Cannot PUT a collection */

Japanese translation

modules/dav/main/mod_dav.c:1034-1042

/*
     * 注: depth == 0 の場合、通常は multistatus レスポンスは不要です。しかし、
     * DAV_VALIDATE_PARENT を渡す場合、Request-URI 以外の URI でエラーが発生する可能性があり、
     * その場合は multistatus が必要になります。
     *
     * リソースが存在しない場合 (DAV_RESOURCE_NULL)、そのリソースと親リソースの両方を
     * チェックする必要があります。リソースが存在するか、または locknull リソースである場合は、
     * そのリソースのみをチェックします。
     */

Original comment

/*
     * Note: depth == 0 normally requires no multistatus response. However,
     * if we pass DAV_VALIDATE_PARENT, then we could get an error on a URI
     * other than the Request-URI, thereby requiring a multistatus.
     *
     * If the resource does not exist (DAV_RESOURCE_NULL), then we must
     * check the resource *and* its parent. If the resource exists or is
     * a locknull resource, then we check only the resource.
     */

Japanese translation

modules/dav/main/mod_dav.c:1053-1055

/* RFC 2616 14.16: 無効な Content-Range を受信した場合、
         * そのコンテンツを使用してはならない。
         */

Original comment

/* RFC 2616 14.16: If we receive an invalid Content-Range we must
         * not use the content.
         */

Japanese translation

modules/dav/main/mod_dav.c:2475

/* リソースが変更可能であることを確認する（バージョン管理リポジトリの場合） */

Original comment

Japanese translation

modules/dav/main/mod_dav.c:1137

Original comment

/* write whatever we read, until we see an error */

Japanese translation

modules/dav/main/mod_dav.c:1159

/* コミット */

Original comment

/* commit */

Japanese translation

modules/dav/main/mod_dav.c:1163-1167

/*
     * 現在リソースが存在すると見なしていることを確認する。
     * ### うわっ。書き込み中にエラーが発生し、コミットされなかった場合、
     * ### リソースは存在しない可能性がある (例: dav_fs_repos.c)
     */

Original comment

/*
     * Ensure that we think the resource exists now.
     * ### eek. if an error occurred during the write and we did not commit,
     * ### then the resource might NOT exist (e.g. dav_fs_repos.c)
     */

Japanese translation

/* リソースの変更可能性を元の状態に戻す */

/* restore modifiability of resources back to what they were */

Japanese translation

/* check for errors now */

   STATUS, and PROPSTATS) and stream it via WRES's ctx->brigade. */

Japanese translation

modules/dav/main/mod_dav.c:1281

/* 現在リクエストボディは使用していないため、破棄します。 */

Original comment

Japanese translation

modules/dav/main/mod_dav.c:1303-1305

/* 2518によれば、depthはコレクションに対してのみinfinityでなければならない。
     * コレクション以外の場合、depthは無視される（ただし、不正な値(1)である場合を除く）。
     */

Original comment

/* 2518 says that depth must be infinity only for collections.
     * For non-collections, depth is ignored, unless it is an illegal value (1).
     */

Japanese translation

modules/dav/main/mod_dav.c:4777

/* これはデフォルトメッセージの追加情報を提供します。 */

Original comment

/* This supplies additional information for the default message. */

Japanese translation

modules/dav/main/mod_dav.c:1322-1329

/*
    ** リソースがいずれかの lock/If 条件に失敗した場合、削除を失敗させる必要があります。
    ** 失敗した各リソースは DAV:multistatus ボディ内にリストされ、
    ** 424 レスポンスにラップされます。
    **
    ** リソース自体での失敗は multistatus レスポンスを生成せず、
    ** 内部のメンバー/コレクションのみが生成することに注意してください。
    */

Original comment

/*
    ** If any resources fail the lock/If: conditions, then we must fail
    ** the delete. Each of the failing resources will be listed within
    ** a DAV:multistatus body, wrapped into a 424 response.
    **
    ** Note that a failure on the resource itself does not generate a
    ** multistatus response -- only internal members/collections.
    */

Japanese translation

modules/dav/main/mod_dav.c:1343-1345

/* ### RFC 2518 s. 8.10.5 では、if_header 内のトークンによってロックされたものだけでなく、_すべて_ のロックを解除するように規定されている。
     */

Original comment

/* ### RFC 2518 s. 8.10.5 says to remove _all_ locks, not just those
     *     locked by the token(s) in the if_header.
     */

Japanese translation

modules/dav/main/mod_dav.c:2694

/* バージョン管理されたリソースの場合、親がチェックアウトされていることを確認する */

Original comment

modules/dav/main/mod_dav.c:1760

Original comment

/* DAV header additions registered by external modules */

Japanese translation

modules/dav/main/mod_dav.c:1777-1782

/* ###
     * DAVヘッダー値の長さが63文字を超えるとMSFT Web Foldersがフリーズする！
     * これを回避するため、バージョニング用とライブプロパティプロバイダーの名前空間URI用に、
     * 個別のDAVヘッダーを使用する。
     * ###
     */

Original comment

/* ###
     * MSFT Web Folders chokes if length of DAV header value > 63 characters!
     * To workaround that, we use separate DAV headers for versioning and
     * live prop provider namespace URIs.
     * ###
     */

Japanese translation

modules/dav/main/mod_dav.c:1785-1788

/*
     * バージョニングプロバイダーが存在する場合は、
     * バージョニングオプション用のDAVヘッダーを生成します。
     */

Original comment

/*
     * If there is a versioning provider, generate DAV headers
     * for versioning options.
     */

Japanese translation

modules/dav/main/mod_dav.c:1796-1800

/*
     * すべての liveprop プロバイダーからプロパティセットの URI を収集し、
     * ヘッダー長が長くなる問題を回避するため、URI ごとに個別の DAV ヘッダーを生成する。
     */

Original comment

/*
     * Gather property set URIs from all the liveprop providers,
     * and generate a separate DAV header for each URI, to avoid
     * problems with long header lengths.
     */

Japanese translation

modules/dav/main/mod_dav.c:1808

/* これはMSFT製品に対し、FrontPage拡張機能の検索をスキップするよう指示するものです */

Original comment

/* this tells MSFT products to skip looking for FrontPage extensions */

Japanese translation

modules/dav/main/mod_dav.c:1811-1819

/*
     * リソースに対して許可されるメソッドを決定する。
     * 3つのケース：リソースがnull (3)、ロックnull (7.4)、または存在する場合。
     *
     * すべてのケースでOPTIONSをサポートし、ロックプロバイダーが存在する場合はLOCKもサポートする。
     * (ロック)nullリソースはMKCOLおよびPUTもサポートする。
     * ロックnullはPROPFINDおよびUNLOCKをサポートする。
     * 既存のリソースは多くのメソッドをサポートする。
     */

Original comment

/*
     * Determine which methods are allowed on the resource.
     * Three cases:  resource is null (3), is lock-null (7.4), or exists.
     *
     * All cases support OPTIONS, and if there is a lock provider, LOCK.
     * (Lock-) null resources also support MKCOL and PUT.
     * Lock-null supports PROPFIND and UNLOCK.
     * Existing resources support lots of stuff.
     */

Japanese translation

modules/dav/main/mod_dav.c:1823

/* ### リソースタイプを考慮に入れる */

Original comment

/* ### take into account resource type */

Japanese translation

Japanese translation

modules/dav/main/mod_dav.c:2089-2096

/*
    ** 注: ctx->doc が NULL になるのは DAV_PROPFIND_IS_ALLPROP の場合のみです。
    ** dav_get_allprops() は名前空間の変換を必要としないため、問題ありません。
    **
    ** 注: "const" を外すためにキャストしています。ただし、読み取り専用で
    ** 開いているため、propdb がリソースを変更しようとすることはありません。
    */

Original comment

/*
    ** Note: ctx->doc can only be NULL for DAV_PROPFIND_IS_ALLPROP. Since
    ** dav_get_allprops() does not need to do namespace translation,
    ** we're okay.
    **
    ** Note: we cast to lose the "const". The propdb won't try to change
    ** the resource, however, since we are opening readonly.
    */

Japanese translation

Japanese translation

Japanese translation

modules/dav/main/mod_dav.c:2134-2137

/* この時点で、ctx->scratchpool は単一のレスポンスをストリーミングするために使用されています。この関数はプールを完全に制御するため、このコールバックの次の反復のためにプールをクリアする権限を持っています。 */

Original comment

/* at this point, ctx->scratchpool has been used to stream a
       single response.  this function fully controls the pool, and
       thus has the right to clear it for the next iteration of this
       callback. */

Japanese translation

Japanese translation

modules/dav/main/mod_dav.c:2252

/* doc->namespaces をすべて付加した <multistatus> タグを送信する。 */

Original comment

/* send <multistatus> tag, with all doc->namespaces attached.  */

Japanese translation

modules/dav/main/mod_dav.c:2254-2259

/* 注: 初期の <multistatus> タグからドキュメントの名前空間を省略することはできません。HREF に対して 404 が生成された場合、その 404 で使用するためにドキュメントの名前空間を出力する必要があります。なお、<response> 要素はこれらの ns0、ns1 等をオーバーライドしますが、badprops の <response> スコープ内ではオーバーライドされません。 */

Original comment

/* NOTE: we *cannot* leave out the doc's namespaces from the
       initial <multistatus> tag.  if a 404 was generated for an HREF,
       then we need to spit out the doc's namespaces for use by the
       404. Note that <response> elements will override these ns0,
       ns1, etc, but NOT within the <response> scope for the
       badprops. */

Japanese translation

modules/dav/main/mod_dav.c:2263

/* プロバイダーにリソースを走査させる。 */

Original comment

/* Have the provider walk the resource. */

Japanese translation

modules/dav/main/mod_dav.c:2271-2276

/* リソースの走査中にエラーが発生した場合、接続を中断してエラーをログに記録する以外にできることは基本的にありません。これはHTTPの制限の一つであり、レスポンスを生成する前にレスポンスの全ステータスを「知る」必要がありますが、このようなストリーミング形式のレスポンス状況ではそれは不可能です。 */

Original comment

/* If an error occurred during the resource walk, there's
           basically nothing we can do but abort the connection and
           log an error.  This is one of the limitations of HTTP; it
           needs to "know" the entire status of the response before
           generating it, which is just impossible in these streamy
           response situations. */

Japanese translation

modules/dav/main/mod_dav.c:2301

/* ### ステータスコードと説明でソートできると良いかもしれません */

Original comment

/* ### might be nice to sort by status code and description */

Japanese translation

/* まだ何も割り当てられていないため、424にする */

Original comment

/* nothing was assigned here yet, so make it a 424 */

Japanese translation

Original comment

Japanese translation

modules/dav/main/mod_dav.c:2359-2362

/*
     * ### レスポンスの組み立て方は見直す必要があるかもしれません...
     * ### このコードはすべてが status==200 を返すことを前提としています。
     */

Original comment

/*
     * ### we probably need to revise the way we assemble the response...
     * ### this code assumes everything will return status==200.
     */

Japanese translation

modules/dav/main/mod_dav.c:2385-2394

/*
 * 各コンテキストに対して <func> を呼び出します。エラーが発生した時点で停止することも、
 * 単にリスト全体を反復処理することもできます。
 *
 * エラーが発生した場合（かつ反復処理が中断された場合）は 1 を返します。すべての要素が
 * 処理された場合は 0 を返します。
 *
 * <reverse> が真（0以外）の場合、リストは逆順で走査されます。
 */

Original comment

/*
 * Call <func> for each context. This can stop when an error occurs, or
 * simply iterate through the whole list.
 *
 * Returns 1 if an error occurs (and the iteration is aborted). Returns 0
 * if all elements are processed.
 *
 * If <reverse> is true (non-zero), then the list is traversed in
 * reverse order.
 */

Japanese translation

/* これは ap_setup_client_block() からコピーしたものです。REQUEST_NO_BODY を渡すことでこの動作にかなり近づけることはできますが、HTTP_UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE を返す必要があります（一方、ap_setup_client_block は HTTP_REQUEST_ENTITY_TOO_LARGE を返します）。 */

Original comment

/* This is snarfed from ap_setup_client_block(). We could get pretty
     * close to this behavior by passing REQUEST_NO_BODY, but we need to
     * return HTTP_UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE (while ap_setup_client_block
     * returns HTTP_REQUEST_ENTITY_TOO_LARGE). */

Original comment

Japanese translation

modules/dav/main/mod_dav.c:2675-2685

/*
     * If-ヘッダーおよび既存のロックを確認する。
     *
     * 注: depth == 0 の場合、通常は multistatus レスポンスは不要である。
     * しかし、DAV_VALIDATE_PARENT を渡した場合は、Request-URI 以外の URI で
     * エラーが発生する可能性があるため、multistatus が必要となる。
     *
     * リソースが存在しない場合 (DAV_RESOURCE_NULL)、そのリソースと
     * その親を確認しなければならない。リソースが存在するか、
     * locknull リソースである場合は、そのリソースのみを確認する。
     */

Original comment

/*
     * Check If-Headers and existing locks.
     *
     * Note: depth == 0 normally requires no multistatus response. However,
     * if we pass DAV_VALIDATE_PARENT, then we could get an error on a URI
     * other than the Request-URI, thereby requiring a multistatus.
     *
     * If the resource does not exist (DAV_RESOURCE_NULL), then we must
     * check the resource *and* its parent. If the resource exists or is
     * a locknull resource, then we check only the resource.
     */

Japanese translation

/* are the source and destination the same? */

Japanese translation

modules/dav/main/mod_dav.c:2898

/* Depthヘッダーの値を取得して解析する。"0" および "infinity" が有効。 */

Original comment

/* get and parse the Depth header value. "0" and "infinity" are legal. */

Japanese translation

modules/dav/main/mod_dav.c:2917-2929

/*
     * ソース内の各リソースについて、Ifヘッダーと既存のロックを確認する。
     * DAV:multistatusボディを含む424レスポンスを返す。
     * multistatusレスポンスには、検証に失敗したリソースに関する情報が含まれる。
     *
     * MOVEの場合は、親リソースも確認する。リソースを移動すると実質的に親コレクションから削除されるため、
     * 適切な条件が満たされていることを確認する必要がある。
     *
     * Request-URI自体に問題が発生した場合は、（multistatusではなく）単純なエラーが返される。
     */

Original comment

/*
     * Check If-Headers and existing locks for each resource in the source.
     * We will return a 424 response with a DAV:multistatus body.
     * The multistatus responses will contain the information about any
     * resource that fails the validation.
     *
     * We check the parent resource, too, if this is a MOVE. Moving the
     * resource effectively removes it from the parent collection, so we
     * must ensure that we have met the appropriate conditions.
     *
     * If a problem occurs with the Request-URI itself, then a plain error
     * (rather than a multistatus) will be returned.
     */

Japanese translation

modules/dav/main/mod_dav.c:4845-4854

/*
     * 移動先（destination）のIfヘッダーと既存のロックを確認する。移動/コピーが完了する前にターゲット（階層）が削除されるため、depth==infinityを使用することに注意。
     *
     * ターゲットを上書きすることはDELETEを意味するため、DELETEと同様のエラー/レスポンス規則が適用される点に注意。具体的には、検証のいずれかが失敗した場合、424エラーを返す。
     * （詳細については dav_method_delete() を参照のこと）
     */

Original comment

/*
     * Check If-Headers and existing locks for destination. Note that we
     * use depth==infinity since the target (hierarchy) will be deleted
     * before the move/copy is completed.
     *
     * Note that we are overwriting the target, which implies a DELETE, so
     * we are subject to the error/response rules as a DELETE. Namely, we
     * will return a 424 error if any of the validations fail.
     * (see dav_method_delete() for more information)
     */

Japanese translation

modules/dav/main/mod_dav.c:2983-2987

/* 移動先は（移動元を含んでいるため）存在しなければならず、
         * 上記の条件は Overwrite==T を意味する。当然ながら、MOVE/COPY の前に
         * 移動先を削除することはできない。なぜなら、そうすると移動元も
         * 削除されてしまうからである。
         */

Original comment

/* The destination must exist (since it contains the source), and
         * a condition above implies Overwrite==T. Obviously, we cannot
         * delete the Destination before the MOVE/COPY, as that would
         * delete the Source.
         */

Japanese translation

modules/dav/main/mod_dav.c:2995

/* ### 現時点では、ボディ内に何も必要ありません */

Original comment

/* ### for now, we don't need anything in the body */

Japanese translation

modules/dav/main/mod_dav.c:3005

/* 古いリソースからすべてのロックを解除する */

Original comment

/* remove any locks from the old resources */

Japanese translation

modules/dav/main/mod_dav.c:3006-3015

/*
     * ### これは「もう一つのトラバーサル (Yet Another Traversal)」です。rename() を実行する場合、
     * ### 移動前後で inode 値が一定に保たれるため、一部のケースではこの処理は不要です。
     * ### しかし、プロバイダーの外部からはその事実を知ることができません :-(
     *
     * ### 注意：移動/コピー処理におけるアトミック性の問題が発生するようになりました。
     * ### この処理の後に失敗するとロックが解除されてしまうためです（技術的には
     * ### これでも許容されますが、実際には……）
     */

Original comment

/*
     * ### this is Yet Another Traversal. if we do a rename(), then we
     * ### really don't have to do this in some cases since the inode
     * ### values will remain constant across the move. but we can't
     * ### know that fact from outside the provider :-(
     *
     * ### note that we now have a problem atomicity in the move/copy
     * ### since a failure after this would have removed locks (technically,
     * ### this is okay to do, but really...)
     */

Japanese translation

modules/dav/main/mod_dav.c:3017

/* ### これは誤りです！親リソースに対するロックを直接解除してしまいます */

Original comment

/* ### this is wrong! it blasts direct locks on parent resources */

Japanese translation

modules/dav/main/mod_dav.c:3018

/* ### lockdbをパス！ */

Original comment

/* ### pass lockdb! */

Japanese translation

modules/dav/main/mod_dav.c:3022

/* これが移動である場合、ソースの親コレクションが変更されます */

Original comment

/* if this is a move, then the source parent collection will be modified */

Japanese translation

modules/dav/main/mod_dav.c:3034-3037

/*
     * ロックシステムがどのように変更されたかを通知できるように、
     * 宛先の初期状態を記憶しておく。
     */

Original comment

/*
     * Remember the initial state of the destination, so the lock system
     * can be notified as to how it changed.
     */

Japanese translation

modules/dav/main/mod_dav.c:3040-3045

/* MOVE操作では、宛先はソースによって置き換えられます。
     * COPY操作では、宛先が存在し、バージョン管理下にあり、
     * かつソースと同じリソースタイプである場合、
     * それは置き換えられるべきではなく、ソースのコピーとなるように変更されるべきです。
     */

Original comment

/* In a MOVE operation, the destination is replaced by the source.
     * In a COPY operation, if the destination exists, is under version
     * control, and is the same resource type as the source,
     * then it should not be replaced, but modified to be a copy of
     * the source.
     */

Japanese translation

modules/dav/main/mod_dav.c:3057-3059

/* 宛先を作成または置換する必要がある場合は、
     * 親コレクションが書き込み可能であることを確認してください
     */

Original comment

/* If the destination must be created or replaced,
     * make sure the parent collection is writable
     */

Japanese translation

modules/dav/main/mod_dav.c:3061

/*親のみ*/

Original comment

/*parent_only*/

Japanese translation

modules/dav/main/mod_dav.c:3063-3065

/* 宛先を書き込み可能にできませんでした:
             * 移動の場合、ソースの親の状態を復元する
             */

Original comment

/* could not make destination writable:
             * if move, restore state of source parent
             */

Japanese translation

modules/dav/main/mod_dav.c:3067

/* 元に戻す */

Original comment

/* undo */

Japanese translation

modules/dav/main/mod_dav.c:3079-3083

/* ソースと宛先の親が同じ場合は、同じリソースオブジェクトを使用します。
     * これにより、自動バージョン管理を行う際に、一方へのステータス更新がもう一方にも反映されます。
     * そうしないと、親を二重にチェックインしようとする可能性があります。
     */

Original comment

/* If source and destination parents are the same, then
     * use the same resource object, so status updates to one are reflected
     * in the other, when doing auto-versioning. Otherwise,
     * we may try to checkin the parent twice.
     */

Japanese translation

modules/dav/main/mod_dav.c:3092-3094

/* 転送先が置き換えられる場合は、まずそれを削除する
     * (OverwriteがTRUEであることは既知)。その後、リソースのコピー/移動を試みる。
     */

Original comment

/* If destination is being replaced, remove it first
     * (we know Ovewrite must be TRUE). Then try to copy/move the resource.
     */

Japanese translation

modules/dav/main/mod_dav.c:3107

/* 自動バージョニングのクリーンアップを実行する */

Original comment

/* perform any auto-versioning cleanup */

Japanese translation

modules/dav/main/mod_dav.c:3118

/* remove/copy/move操作によるエラーを確認する */

Original comment

/* check for error from remove/copy/move operations */

Japanese translation

modules/dav/main/mod_dav.c:3131

/* 自動バージョニングによるエラーを確認 */

Original comment

/* check for errors from auto-versioning */

Japanese translation

modules/dav/main/mod_dav.c:3151

Original comment

/* propagate any indirect locks at the target */

Japanese translation

/* The move/copy was successful, but the locking failed. */

Japanese translation

modules/dav/main/mod_dav.c:3220

/* 親コレクションが存在するか確認 */

Original comment

/* Check if parent collection exists */

Japanese translation

modules/dav/main/mod_dav.c:3234-3237

/*
     * 書き込み可能で開きます。エラーが発生しない限り、
     * データベースへの書き込みを行います。
     */
